title: Submission: GANGUS × NEXUS — Multi-Model AI Orchestrator (gangus-nexus)
author: wojciechkowalczyk11to-tech
body:
## Submission: GANGUS × NEXUS AI Orchestrator

**Approach:** AI-orchestrated architecture search using multi-tier model delegation.

Instead of manual iteration, we use a **production AI infrastructure stack** to systematically explore architecture space:

| Layer | System | Role |
|-------|--------|------|
| **Brain** | GPT-5.4 Codex | Strategic planning, experiment design |
| **Orchestrator** | [Gangus AI](https://github.com/wojciechkowalczyk11to-tech/Gangus_Ai) | Multi-model routing, cost optimization, token guard |
| **Backend** | [N.O.C](https://github.com/wojciechkowalczyk11to-tech/N.O.C) | 8 LLM providers, RAG + pgvector, multi-agent runtime |
| **Research** | [GigaGrok](https://github.com/wojciechkowalczyk11to-tech/gigagrok-bot) | Grok 4.20 with web+X search, 925-doc knowledge base |
| **Infra** | [NEXUS MCP](https://github.com/wojciechkowalczyk11to-tech/nexus-mcp-server-public) | 54-tool control plane: RunPod, GCP, GitHub, Cloudflare |

### Architecture candidates:
- Cross-layer weight sharing (~40% param reduction)
- GQA with reduced KV heads
- SwiGLU FFN + RoPE (zero positional params)
- Hybrid transformer + linear attention (RWKV-style)
- Post-training int8 quantization + magnitude pruning

### Status: Active development
- Infrastructure: ✅ Live (mcp.nexus-oc.pl)
- Research pipeline: ✅ Running
- First training runs: 🔄 In progress

Full approach details in `submissions/gangus-nexus/README.md`

---
*Team: Wojciech Kowalczyk | Poland | AI Systems Developer*
*Stack: Claude Opus 4.6 + GPT-5.4 + Grok 4.20 + DeepSeek + Mistral + 54 MCP tools*
